title: Sustainable Livelihood
overview: MRC Nepal supports tackling poverty among the poorest of the poor by promoting entrepreneurship in agriculture and non-agricultural base enterprises such as goats, pigs, fishery, off-season vegetables, NTFP, herbs, and dairy.
activities: Food and Nutritional Security for rural and vulnerable communities
Promotion of small to medium enterprises
Integrated Community Development through subsistence agriculture

title: Education and Human Rights
overview: Information and education are fundamental cornerstones for sustainable development. We promote child rights, self-governance, and peace-building conflict resolution approaches.
activities: Promoting awareness on financial education and management

title: Health and Sanitation
overview: Access to sustainable, reliable, safe water supply and environmental sanitation facilities is a basic human right. We work to eradicate preventable diseases and provide critical health support.

title: Environment and Biodiversity
overview: We believe natural resource and biodiversity management are vital for improving rural development. We focus on developing resource endowments like land and forestry.
activities: Conservation of Local Species and Heritages
Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) and Climate Change resilience

title: Renewable Energy
overview: Renewable energy has been considered an important aspect not only for rural livelihoods but also for overall national development.
activities: Improving access to energy for targeted beneficiaries
Focusing on both primary generation and end-use
